meta.title: The Middle East in Free Fall: The Islamic State, the Iranian Axis, and the Muslim World in  Crisis
meta.description: Hussain Abdul-Hussain, Michael Pregent, and Lee Smith discuss how to confront the problems  consuming the Middle East.
